data.name: dataColumn1.DefaultValue
data.value: AAEAAAD/////AQAAAAAAAAAMAgAAAEhTeXN0ZW0uUHJpdmF0ZS5Db3JlTGliLCBDdWx0dXJlPW5ldXRy YWwsIFB1YmxpY0tleVRva2VuPTdjZWM4NWQ3YmVhNzc5OGUFAQAAAB9TeXN0ZW0uVW5pdHlTZXJpYWxp emF0aW9uSG9sZGVyAwAAAAREYXRhCVVuaXR5VHlwZQxBc3NlbWJseU5hbWUBAAEIAgAAAAoCAAAABgMA AAAACw==

data.name: comboBoxCrystalSystem.ToolTip
data.value: Crystal system to search. Sets the number of free lattice parameters (triclinic=6 ... cubic=1); fewer unknowns means a faster, more constrained search.

data.name: numericUpDownMinA.ToolTip
data.value: Lower bound of axis length a (Å) for the search. Candidates with a outside this range are rejected.

data.name: numericUpDownMaxA.ToolTip
data.value: Upper bound of axis length a (Å) for the search.

data.name: numericUpDownMinB.ToolTip
data.value: Lower bound of axis length b (Å) for the search.

data.name: numericUpDownMaxB.ToolTip
data.value: Upper bound of axis length b (Å) for the search.

data.name: numericUpDownMinC.ToolTip
data.value: Lower bound of axis length c (Å) for the search.

data.name: numericUpDownMaxC.ToolTip
data.value: Upper bound of axis length c (Å) for the search.

data.name: numericUpDownMinAlpha.ToolTip
data.value: Lower bound of interaxial angle alpha (degrees) for the search.

data.name: numericUpDownMaxAlpha.ToolTip
data.value: Upper bound of interaxial angle alpha (degrees, max 180).

data.name: numericUpDownMinBeta.ToolTip
data.value: Lower bound of interaxial angle beta (degrees) for the search.

data.name: numericUpDownMaxBeta.ToolTip
data.value: Upper bound of interaxial angle beta (degrees, max 180).

data.name: numericUpDownMinGamma.ToolTip
data.value: Lower bound of interaxial angle gamma (degrees) for the search.

data.name: numericUpDownMaxGamma.ToolTip
data.value: Upper bound of interaxial angle gamma (degrees, max 180).

data.name: waveLengthControl1.ToolTip
data.value: Radiation source and wavelength used to convert observed d-spacings (default Cu Kalpha1, 0.15418 nm).

data.name: numericalTextBox1.ToolTip
data.value: Observed d-spacing (Å) of the peak to add to the list below.

data.name: comboBoxReliability.ToolTip
data.value: Reliability of the peak being added (High/Medium/Low); weights the least-squares fit (High=1, Medium=0.5, Low=0.1).

data.name: buttonAddPeak.ToolTip
data.value: Add the entered d-spacing and reliability as a new row in the peak list.

data.name: dataGridView1.ToolTip
data.value: Editable list of observed peaks: tick 'Use for Calc. ', set reliability and d_obs; Delete removes a row. Indexed h k l, d_calc and diff appear after a search.

data.name: buttonFind.ToolTip
data.value: Start the auto-indexing search. While running, click again to cancel it.

data.name: button1.ToolTip
data.value: Resume the search keeping the current candidates instead of clearing them (shares the Find handler).

data.name: dataGridViewResult.ToolTip
data.value: Candidate cells (best 300) sorted by R; click a row to apply its hkl indexing to the peak list and highlight it on the map. SigmadQ and R are figures of merit (smaller is better).

data.name: comboBoxX.ToolTip
data.value: Lattice parameter (a/b/c/alpha/beta/gamma) plotted on the distribution map's X-axis.

data.name: comboBoxY.ToolTip
data.value: Lattice parameter (a/b/c/alpha/beta/gamma) plotted on the distribution map's Y-axis.

data.name: distributionGraphControl1.ToolTip
data.value: Scatter map of candidate cells in the chosen X-Y parameter space, colored by R (figure of merit).
